TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Malepa, title = Malepa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Malepa} }

S.FORM: == Malepa == Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang Malepa. 200 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 645 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 625 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 20 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 93%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq 2%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%. Pnyahan pnatas Hangan alang Marepa Tu-ku-bey-cu na alang Pnspuwan alang Sinwangyang mi alang Qhdin ddha alang. Nniqan niya Nanto keyng Jinay go Rising cwen. Knlbangan Rising cwen pa wa mniq Hwasyang cwen hnruwan hidaw, tudaya bay Yayung Peykang, lmutuc Ddwiya Gokang ka hnruwan hidaw, tudaya u tnuayus Cweyhwa cwen, pryaxan hidaw mi tuhunac u mslutuc Hwasyang cwen, tudaya u msqapah Taycyu su Hoping cyu. Nniqan lnglingay Qnpahan so bay qlqahan. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu: Tayhoku> Formosa Kwotaw 3 haw> Sweysaryeyn Kwotaw 6 haw> Tay14 seyng>Hari>Paran>Elu Rising seyng> dhuq alang niyi da. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyncu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Tayal Sduwi na kari saya Skari kari Tayal, ska kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Kiristo kyo: Marepa Kiristo Cyoro Kyokay, Rising Sin Yasu Kyokay. Pnyahan alang Rising cwen pa wa mniq Hwasyang cwen hnruwan hidaw, tudaya bay Yayung Peykang, lmutuc Ddwiya Gokang ka hnruwan hidaw, tudaya u tnuayus Cweyhwa cwen, pryaxan hidaw mi tuhunac u mslutuc Hwasyang cwen, tudaya u msqapah Taycyu su Hoping cyu. Dxral saya pa niqan alang Sinwangyang mi alang Qhdin ddha alang. 1,Sinwangyang Wayang, ngalan dha tmhangan Mkmoyaw tmhangan ka sediq alang, dxral nniqan cbiyaw pa wa mniq nniqan turunac Yayung Peykang nbuyas ddwiyaq saya. Qlhangan Tanah Tunux cida pa, mnneniq trahuc dxral mhrus, naqah niqan mncahaya ka sediq alang dmi, kiya ka musa thdil tudaya alang mi mquri dxral nniqan habung alang Sinwangyang saya. Bukuy daw wada msunu truma ka dxral mi, mqlahang quri so alang ka seyhu dmi, kiya ka mniq kngkawas 1976 cida, dmudul sediq alang musa thdil 300 m hnruwan hidaw hunac Lumuwan, phiyu nanaq alang dungan, thnganan Sinwangyang, wada lixan ka alang Mkmoyaw. Tayang uxay daw Plmuwan u, phiyu alang mniq pnstrngan Yayung Peykang mi cida niya Yayung Kyabung dxral ddwiyaq hnruwan hidaw hiya, pryaxan hidaw u mquri dxral mhrus, alang u psnakan dha pnswayan rudan; mntna llutuc quri Plmuwan kana. Nniqan dxral alang Plmuwan cbiyaw u wa mniq dxral tudaya hari 300 m Tayang, pnhiyu ni awah qmlahang Taiwan ka Nihong tikwo nina. Miyah qduriq Taiwan ka Kokominto seyhu daw, niqan kingal alang ka wada mquri pryaxan hidaw thdil, Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw == Qntan patas ==
S.PHON: == mal…ôpa == gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč mal…ôpa. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq *%, bunun *%, amis *%. pnjańßan pnatas ńßaŇčan alaŇč ma…ĺ…ôpa tu-ku-b…ô- ¶u na alaŇč pnspuwan alaŇč sinwaŇčjaŇč mi alaŇč qńßdin ddńßa alaŇč. nniqan nija nanto k…ôŇč …üinaj go …ĺisiŇč ¶w…ôn. knlbaŇčan …ĺisiŇč ¶w…ôn pa wa mniq ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw, tudaja baj jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč, lmutu ¶ ddwija gokaŇč ka ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw, tudaja u tnuajus ¶w…ôńßwa ¶w…ôn, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw mi tuńßuna ¶ u mslutu ¶ ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn, tudaja u msqapańß taj ¶ju su ńßopiŇč ¶ju. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj qnpańßan so baj qlqańßan. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu: tajńßoku> *o…ĺmosa kwotaw * ńßaw> sw…ôsa…ĺj…ôn kwotaw * ńßaw> taj** s…ôŇč>ńßa…ĺi>pa…ĺan>…ôlu …ĺisiŇč s…ôŇč> dńßuq alaŇč niji da. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq tajal sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ska…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ska ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan ki…ĺisto kjo: ma…ĺ…ôpa ki…ĺisto ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, …ĺisiŇč sin jasu kjokaj. pnjańßan alaŇč …ĺisiŇč ¶w…ôn pa wa mniq ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw, tudaja baj jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč, lmutu ¶ ddwija gokaŇč ka ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw, tudaja u tnuajus ¶w…ôńßwa ¶w…ôn, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw mi tuńßuna ¶ u mslutu ¶ ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn, tudaja u msqapańß taj ¶ju su ńßopiŇč ¶ju. dx…ĺal saja pa niqan alaŇč sinwaŇčjaŇč mi alaŇč qńßdin ddńßa alaŇč. *,sinwaŇčjaŇč wajaŇč, Ňčalan dńßa tmńßaŇčan mkmojaw tmńßaŇčan ka s…ôdiq alaŇč, dx…ĺal nniqan ¶bijaw pa wa mniq nniqan tu…ĺuna ¶ jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč nbujas ddwijaq saja. qlńßaŇčan tanańß tunux ¶ida pa, mnn…ôniq t…ĺańßu ¶ dx…ĺal mńß…ĺus, naqańß niqan mn ¶ańßaja ka s…ôdiq alaŇč dmi, kija ka musa tńßdil tudaja alaŇč mi mqu…ĺi dx…ĺal nniqan ńßabuŇč alaŇč sinwaŇčjaŇč saja. bukuj daw wada msunu t…ĺuma ka dx…ĺal mi, mqlańßaŇč qu…ĺi so alaŇč ka s…ôńßu dmi, kija ka mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, dmudul s…ôdiq alaŇč musa tńßdil *** m ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw ńßuna ¶ lumuwan, pńßiju nanaq alaŇč duŇčan, tńßŇčanan sinwaŇčjaŇč, wada lixan ka alaŇč mkmojaw. tajaŇč uxaj daw plmuwan u, pńßiju alaŇč mniq pnst…ĺŇčan jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč mi ¶ida nija jajuŇč kjabuŇč dx…ĺal ddwijaq ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw ńßija, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw u mqu…ĺi dx…ĺal mńß…ĺus, alaŇč u psnakan dńßa pnswajan …ĺudan; mntna llutu ¶ qu…ĺi plmuwan kana. nniqan dx…ĺal alaŇč plmuwan ¶bijaw u wa mniq dx…ĺal tudaja ńßa…ĺi *** m tajaŇč, pnńßiju ni awańß qmlańßaŇč taiwan ka nińßoŇč tikwo nina. mijańß qdu…ĺiq taiwan ka kokominto s…ôńßu daw, niqan kiŇčal alaŇč ka wada mqu…ĺi p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw tńßdil, qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw == qntan patas ==
S.FORM: == Malepa == Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang Malepa. 200 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 645 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 625 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 20 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 93%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq 2%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%. Pnyahan pnatas Hangan alang Marepa Tu-ku-bey-cu na alang Pnspuwan alang Sinwangyang mi alang Qhdin ddha alang. Nniqan niya Nanto keyng Jinay go Rising cwen. Knlbangan Rising cwen pa wa mniq Hwasyang cwen hnruwan hidaw, tudaya bay Yayung Peykang, lmutuc Ddwiya Gokang ka hnruwan hidaw, tudaya u tnuayus Cweyhwa cwen, pryaxan hidaw mi tuhunac u mslutuc Hwasyang cwen, tudaya u msqapah Taycyu su Hoping cyu. Nniqan lnglingay Qnpahan so bay qlqahan. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu: Tayhoku> Formosa Kwotaw 3 haw> Sweysaryeyn Kwotaw 6 haw> Tay14 seyng>Hari>Paran>Elu Rising seyng> dhuq alang niyi da. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyncu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Tayal Sduwi na kari saya Skari kari Tayal, ska kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Kiristo kyo: Marepa Kiristo Cyoro Kyokay, Rising Sin Yasu Kyokay. Pnyahan alang Rising cwen pa wa mniq Hwasyang cwen hnruwan hidaw, tudaya bay Yayung Peykang, lmutuc Ddwiya Gokang ka hnruwan hidaw, tudaya u tnuayus Cweyhwa cwen, pryaxan hidaw mi tuhunac u mslutuc Hwasyang cwen, tudaya u msqapah Taycyu su Hoping cyu. Dxral saya pa niqan alang Sinwangyang mi alang Qhdin ddha alang. 1,Sinwangyang Wayang, ngalan dha tmhangan Mkmoyaw tmhangan ka sediq alang, dxral nniqan cbiyaw pa wa mniq nniqan turunac Yayung Peykang nbuyas ddwiyaq saya. Qlhangan Tanah Tunux cida pa, mnneniq trahuc dxral mhrus, naqah niqan mncahaya ka sediq alang dmi, kiya ka musa thdil tudaya alang mi mquri dxral nniqan habung alang Sinwangyang saya. Bukuy daw wada msunu truma ka dxral mi, mqlahang quri so alang ka seyhu dmi, kiya ka mniq kngkawas 1976 cida, dmudul sediq alang musa thdil 300 m hnruwan hidaw hunac Lumuwan, phiyu nanaq alang dungan, thnganan Sinwangyang, wada lixan ka alang Mkmoyaw. Tayang uxay daw Plmuwan u, phiyu alang mniq pnstrngan Yayung Peykang mi cida niya Yayung Kyabung dxral ddwiyaq hnruwan hidaw hiya, pryaxan hidaw u mquri dxral mhrus, alang u psnakan dha pnswayan rudan; mntna llutuc quri Plmuwan kana. Nniqan dxral alang Plmuwan cbiyaw u wa mniq dxral tudaya hari 300 m Tayang, pnhiyu ni awah qmlahang Taiwan ka Nihong tikwo nina. Miyah qduriq Taiwan ka Kokominto seyhu daw, niqan kingal alang ka wada mquri pryaxan hidaw thdil, Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw == Qntan patas ==

¶w…ôn ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw, tudaja baj jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč, lmutu ¶ ddwija gokaŇč ka ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw, tudaja u tnuajus ¶w…ôńßwa ¶w…ôn, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw mi tuńßuna ¶ u mslutu ¶ ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn, tudaja u ki…ĺisto kjo: ma…ĺ…ôpa ki…ĺisto ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, …ĺisiŇč sin jasu kjokaj. pnjańßan alaŇč …ĺisiŇč ¶w…ôn pa wa mniq ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw, tudaja baj jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč, lmutu ¶ ddwija gokaŇč ka ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw, tudaja u tnuajus ¶w…ôńßwa ¶w…ôn, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw mi tuńßuna ¶ u mslutu ¶ ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn, tudaja u msqapańß taj ¶ju su ńßopiŇč ¶ju. dx…ĺal saja pa niqan alaŇč sinwaŇčjaŇč mi alaŇč qńßdin ddńßa alaŇč. *,sinwaŇčjaŇč wajaŇč, Ňčalan dńßa tmńßaŇčan mkmojaw tmńßaŇčan ka s…ôdiq alaŇč, dx…ĺal nniqan ¶bijaw pa wa mniq nniqan tu…ĺuna ¶ jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč nbujas ddwijaq saja. qlńßaŇčan tanańß tunux ¶ida pa, mnn…ôniq t…ĺańßu ¶ dx…ĺal mńß…ĺus, naqańß niqan mn ¶ańßaja ka s…ôdiq alaŇč dmi, kija ka musa tńßdil tudaja alaŇč mi mqu…ĺi dx…ĺal nniqan ńßabuŇč alaŇč sinwaŇčjaŇč saja. bukuj daw wada msunu t…ĺuma ka dx…ĺal mi, mqlańßaŇč qu…ĺi so alaŇč ka s…ôńßu dmi, kija ka mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, dmudul s…ôdiq alaŇč musa tńßdil *** m ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw ńßuna ¶ lumuwan, pńßiju nanaq alaŇč duŇčan, tńßŇčanan sinwaŇčjaŇč, wada lixan ka alaŇč mkmojaw. tajaŇč uxaj daw plmuwan u, pńßiju alaŇč mniq pnst…ĺŇčan jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč mi ¶ida nija jajuŇč kjabuŇč dx…ĺal ddwijaq ńßn…ĺuwan ńßidaw ńßija, p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw u mqu…ĺi dx…ĺal mńß…ĺus, alaŇč u psnakan dńßa pnswajan …ĺudan; mntna llutu ¶ qu…ĺi plmuwan kana. nniqan dx…ĺal alaŇč plmuwan ¶bijaw u wa mniq dx…ĺal tudaja ńßa…ĺi *** m tajaŇč, pnńßiju ni awańß qmlańßaŇč taiwan ka nińßoŇč tikwo nina. mijańß qdu…ĺiq taiwan ka kokominto s…ôńßu daw, niqan kiŇčal alaŇč ka wada mqu…ĺi p…ĺjaxan ńßidaw tńßdil, qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw == qntan patas ==
